untranslatable_reason: Signal requires GARCH model coefficients and futures expiration day identification which are not available in the allowed indicators list. GARCH volatility modeling, expiration day dummy variable significance testing, and statistical mean/variance level analysis cannot be expressed using only the provided technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, etc.). The signal is fundamentally based on econometric modeling outputs rather than real-time price/volume technicals.
translation_notes: This signal describes a statistical volatility event study (expiration day effect) requiring GARCH estimation and hypothesis testing. While hvol_20 (historical volatility) could proxy for increased volatility, it cannot capture the GARCH coefficient significance or the conditional mean/variance structure described in the original research. A proper implementation would require custom GARCH indicators or a separate statistical validation layer outside the standard technical indicator framework.
